# Comprehensive redaction gate for the agent-safe proof loop. A realistic vault
# is created through CLI commands carrying distinctive markers, then every output
# surface — default summary, --json, --agent, --events, stderr, saved plan files,
# events and integration evidence — is scanned for all forbidden sensitive classes.
#
# Bounded snippets around search matches are expected and allowed; full note body
# dumps as data fields, tokens, Authorization headers and provider payloads are not.

# Seed a vault with notes carrying distinctive body markers.
exec sh -c 'pinax init vault --title Vault --json > red_init.json'
validate-json-envelope red_init.json

exec sh -c 'pinax inbox capture "redaction inbox marker" --vault vault --json > red_capture.json'
validate-json-envelope red_capture.json

exec sh -c 'pinax journal daily append --body "redaction journal marker" --vault vault --json > red_journal.json'
validate-json-envelope red_journal.json

# A normal note whose body must stay inside the note file for bounded reads.
exec sh -c 'pinax note add "Redaction Target" --body "REDACT_FULL_BODY_SENTINEL must stay inside the note file" --vault vault --json > red_note.json'
validate-json-envelope red_note.json

exec sh -c 'pinax index sync --vault vault --json > red_index.json'
validate-json-envelope red_index.json

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Surface 1: default summary mode (human-readable stdout).
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
exec sh -c 'pinax vault doctor --vault vault > red_doctor_default.txt'
exec sh -c 'pinax repair plan --vault vault > red_repair_default.txt'
exec sh -c 'pinax organize plan --vault vault > red_organize_default.txt'
exec sh -c 'pinax note orphans --vault vault > red_orphans_default.txt'

# Default summary surfaces must not leak the full body sentinel.
exec sh -c '! grep -q "REDACT_FULL_BODY_SENTINEL" red_doctor_default.txt red_repair_default.txt red_organize_default.txt red_orphans_default.txt'

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Surface 2: --json bounded projections.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
exec sh -c 'pinax vault doctor --vault vault --json > red_doctor.json'
validate-json-envelope red_doctor.json
exec sh -c 'pinax repair plan --vault vault --json > red_repair.json'
validate-json-envelope red_repair.json
exec sh -c 'pinax organize plan --vault vault --json > red_organize.json'
validate-json-envelope red_organize.json
exec sh -c 'pinax note orphans --vault vault --json > red_orphans.json'
validate-json-envelope red_orphans.json

# JSON bounded projections must not dump full body as a data field.
exec sh -c '! grep -q "REDACT_FULL_BODY_SENTINEL" red_doctor.json red_repair.json red_organize.json red_orphans.json'
exec sh -c '! grep -q "\"body\":\"" red_doctor.json red_orphans.json'

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Surface 3: --agent bounded projections.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
exec sh -c 'pinax vault doctor --vault vault --agent > red_doctor_agent.txt'
validate-agent-format red_doctor_agent.txt
exec sh -c 'pinax note orphans --vault vault --agent > red_orphans_agent.txt'
validate-agent-format red_orphans_agent.txt
exec sh -c '! grep -q "REDACT_FULL_BODY_SENTINEL" red_doctor_agent.txt red_orphans_agent.txt'

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Surface 4: --events bounded projections.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
exec sh -c 'pinax vault doctor --vault vault --events > red_doctor_events.txt'
exec sh -c 'pinax repair plan --vault vault --events > red_repair_events.txt'
exec sh -c '! grep -q "REDACT_FULL_BODY_SENTINEL" red_doctor_events.txt red_repair_events.txt'

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Surface 5: stderr must stay clean (no sensitive markers on stderr).
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
exec sh -c 'pinax vault doctor --vault vault --json > red_stdout.txt 2> red_stderr.txt'
exec sh -c '! grep -q "REDACT_FULL_BODY_SENTINEL" red_stderr.txt'

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Surface 6: saved plan files under .pinax/ must not leak body.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
exec sh -c 'pinax repair plan --save --vault vault --json > red_repair_saved.json'
validate-json-envelope red_repair_saved.json
exec sh -c 'pinax organize plan --save --vault vault --json > red_organize_saved.json'
validate-json-envelope red_organize_saved.json
exec sh -c 'cat vault/.pinax/repair-plans/*.json > red_repair_plan_file.json'
exec sh -c 'cat vault/.pinax/organize-plans/*.json > red_organize_plan_file.json'
exec sh -c '! grep -q "REDACT_FULL_BODY_SENTINEL" red_repair_plan_file.json red_organize_plan_file.json'

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Surface 7: snapshot evidence must not leak body.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
exec sh -c 'pinax version snapshot --vault vault --message "redaction checkpoint" --json > red_snapshot.json'
validate-json-envelope red_snapshot.json
exec sh -c '! grep -q "REDACT_FULL_BODY_SENTINEL" red_snapshot.json'

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# Forbidden classes: Authorization headers, bearer tokens and provider payloads
# must never appear in any bounded surface.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
exec sh -c '! grep -q "Authorization" red_doctor.json red_repair.json red_organize.json red_orphans.json red_doctor_agent.txt red_orphans_agent.txt red_doctor_events.txt red_repair_events.txt'
exec sh -c '! grep -q "Bearer " red_doctor.json red_repair.json red_organize.json red_orphans.json red_doctor_agent.txt red_doctor_events.txt'
exec sh -c '! grep -q "api_key=" red_doctor.json red_repair.json red_organize.json red_orphans.json'
exec sh -c '! grep -q "secret=" red_doctor.json red_repair.json red_organize.json red_orphans.json'

# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
# ANSI escape sequences must never appear in machine-readable surfaces.
# ---------------------------------------------------------------------------
validate-clean-stdout red_doctor.json
validate-clean-stdout red_doctor_agent.txt
validate-clean-stdout red_repair.json
validate-clean-stdout red_organize.json
validate-clean-stdout red_orphans.json
validate-clean-stdout red_doctor_events.txt

# Search returns bounded snippets around matches; it must never dump the full
# note body as a "body":"..." data field. The snippet is allowed to show a short
# excerpt, but a raw body field would be a projection boundary leak.
exec sh -c 'pinax search "REDACT_FULL_BODY_SENTINEL" --vault vault --json > red_search.json'
validate-json-envelope red_search.json
exec sh -c '! grep -q "\"body\":\"" red_search.json'
